name: The Bad Gravedigger
short_description: You have to explore and find a way out of the accursed cemetery of Aynkaria. On the way, you are waiting for ghosts, screamers and a parallel world. Carefully inspect the game locations and read the notes to find clues.
detailed_description:
One day, you woke up in a hut in an old cemetery. Later it turns out that you are the new Gravedigger of this burial ground. The cemetery is not very large, but it is very, very dark. Somewhere the wolves howl, somewhere the screams are not buried, and somewhere and the remnants of these poor creatures. You're armed with a flashlight, explore the cemetery and read the notes, maybe they'll help you find you from the cursed cemetery ...


We recommend playing with headphones and without light.

DLC Insurrection free included

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, German, Simplified Chinese, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
